tests.description: tail: 基本功能，显示最后十行
setup_commands:
echo 'Line 1: Hello world
Line 2: The quick brown fox
Line 3: jumps over the lazy dog
Line 4: 这是中文行，用于测试UTF-8
Line 5: Another line with punctuation!
Line 6: Short
Line 7: 
Line 8: End of section one
Line 9: The last few lines are here
Line 10: Testing tail -n 0 and -n +3
Line 11: Extra line to exceed default 10
Line 12: The quick brown fox jumps again
Line 13: Last line with emoji 😀' > tail_example.txt

execution.stdout:
Line 4: 这是中文行，用于测试UTF-8
Line 5: Another line with punctuation!
Line 6: Short
Line 7: 
Line 8: End of section one
Line 9: The last few lines are here
Line 10: Testing tail -n 0 and -n +3
Line 11: Extra line to exceed default 10
Line 12: The quick brown fox jumps again
Line 13: Last line with emoji 😀
